name: io.github.tosin2013/mcp-adr-analysis-server
description: AI-powered MCP server for analyzing Architectural Decision Records (ADRs).

environmentVariables.name: PROJECT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the project directory to analyze (defaults to current directory)

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenRouter API key for AI-powered analysis (required for full execution mode)

environmentVariables.name: EXECUTION_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Execution mode: 'full' for AI results or 'prompt-only' for prompts (default: prompt-only)

environmentVariables.name: ADR_DIRECTORY
environmentVariables.description: ADR directory relative to project path (default: docs/adrs)
